task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All requirements met: (1) RenameRequest struct added with Source/Destination fields and correct json tags; (2) Client.Rename method POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server RenameHandler validates inputs, calls RenameModel which copies then deletes source, returns 404 for missing source (os.ErrNotExist) and 409 for existing destination (os.ErrExist); (4) Route r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) registered; (5) CLI rename command with cobra.ExactArgs(2); (6) CLI RenameHandler creates client and calls client.Rename; (7) No existing test files modified. Implementation is complete across all layers with proper error handling and status codes.
